title: Slippery Ice

markdown:
# Slippery Ice

Slippery ice is [[difficult_terrain]]. A creature that moves onto slippery ice for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the [[prone]] condition.
